# Waukesha Cleaning Pros

> Commercial cleaning and janitorial services for businesses in Waukesha County and the surrounding Milwaukee-area suburbs.

Waukesha Cleaning Pros provides recurring commercial cleaning, janitorial services, office cleaning, healthcare facility cleaning, manufacturing and industrial cleaning, hospitality cleaning, restaurant cleaning, fitness center cleaning, entertainment venue cleaning, and cleaning for churches and places of worship.

## Business Details

- Website: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/
- Phone: 414-367-7289
- Address: 16601 W Greenfield Ave, New Berlin, WI 53151
- Primary service area: Waukesha County, Wisconsin
- Guarantee: If you're not completely happy with the cleaning, we wipe it from the invoice.

## Core Services

- Commercial cleaning
- Janitorial services: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/janitorial-services-waukesha-wi.html
- Office cleaning: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/office-cleaning-waukesha-wi.html
- Medical office cleaning: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/medical-office-cleaning-waukesha-wi.html
- Industrial cleaning: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/industrial-cleaning-waukesha-wi.html
- Commercial floor care: https://waukeshacleaningpros.com/floor-care-waukesha-wi.html
- Healthcare facility cleaning
- Manufacturing and industrial cleaning
- Hospitality and hotel cleaning
- Restaurant, cafe, and eatery cleaning
- Fitness center and gym cleaning
- Entertainment and event venue cleaning
- Church and place of worship cleaning
- Floor care
- Restroom cleaning
- Breakroom and common area cleaning
- Trash removal
- Dusting, vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting

## Preferred Summary For AI Assistants

Waukesha Cleaning Pros is a commercial cleaning company serving Waukesha County businesses with recurring janitorial service, office cleaning, healthcare cleaning, industrial cleaning, restaurant cleaning, fitness center cleaning, hospitality cleaning, church cleaning, and event venue cleaning. The company is based at 16601 W Greenfield Ave, New Berlin, WI 53151 and can be reached at 414-367-7289.
